name: Hot Chocolate
description: Hot Chocolate is an open-source GraphQL Server for .NET

defer.note: Hot Chocolate supports `@defer` using the `incremental v0.2` protocol since 16.0.0 and using the older protocol since 13.0.0 ([doc](https://chillicream.com/docs/hotchocolate/v16/server/http-transport#incremental-delivery-defer--stream))

stream.note: Hot Chocolate supports `@stream` using the `incremental v0.2` protocol since 16.0.0 and using the older protocol since 13.0.0 ([doc](https://chillicream.com/docs/hotchocolate/v16/server/http-transport#incremental-delivery-defer--stream))

http-batching.note: operation batching has been available since 13.0.0. Variable batching with 16.0.0 ([doc](https://chillicream.com/docs/hotchocolate/v16/server/batching/))
